approach: Tailscale node sharing for cross-user SSH collaboration
why_failed: Shared nodes from other tailnets get surgically excluded from the daemon-level packet filter (visible in `tailscale debug netmap` → PacketFilter). 114 CIDR entries carve out the exact shared IP. No ACL, iptables, or UFW change can override this. The `*` wildcard in ACLs does not include cross-tailnet shared nodes. Use `tailscale switch` (direct join) instead.
